allow: Bash(cd F:/Docker/JellyDJ && docker compose up -d 2>&1 | head -50)
Bash(cd F:/Docker/JellyDJ && docker compose logs backend 2>&1 | tail -20)

Bash(cd F:/Docker/JellyDJ && docker compose exec backend python -c "
from database import SessionLocal
from models import ImportAPIKey
db = SessionLocal\(\)
keys = db.query\(ImportAPIKey\).all\(\)
print\(f'ImportAPIKey table exists with {len\(keys\)} records'\)
print\(f'Columns: {[c.name for c in ImportAPIKey.__table__.columns]}'\)
db.close\(\)
")
Bash(cd F:/Docker/JellyDJ && docker compose restart backend && sleep 3)

Bash(cd F:/Docker/JellyDJ && sleep 3 && docker compose exec backend python -c "
from database import SessionLocal
from models import ImportAPIKey
db = SessionLocal\(\)
keys = db.query\(ImportAPIKey\).all\(\)
print\(f'✓ ImportAPIKey table exists'\)
print\(f'✓ Columns: {[c.name for c in ImportAPIKey.__table__.columns]}'\)
db.close\(\)
")
Bash(sleep 3 && curl -s http://localhost:7879/ | grep -o "ApiKeySection\\|Browser Extension API Key" | head -3)
Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; print\('pillow available'\)" 2>/dev/null || echo "no pillow")

Bash(python -c "
from PIL import Image
src = Image.open\('F:/Docker/JellyDJ/frontend/public/android-chrome-192x192.png'\)
for size, name in [\(16,'icon16'\), \(48,'icon48'\), \(128,'icon128'\)]:
    img = src.resize\(\(size, size\), Image.LANCZOS\)
    img.save\(f'F:/Docker/JellyDJ/browser-extension/icons/{name}.png'\)
    print\(f'Saved {name}.png \({size}x{size}\)'\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import base64
from PIL import Image
import io

img = Image.open\('F:/Docker/JellyDJ/frontend/public/android-chrome-192x192.png'\)
img = img.resize\(\(20, 20\), Image.LANCZOS\)
buf = io.BytesIO\(\)
img.save\(buf, format='PNG'\)
b64 = base64.b64encode\(buf.getvalue\(\)\).decode\(\)
print\(f'data:image/png;base64,{b64}'\)
" 2>&1)
